inputs.prompt: Event: Clearwater Analytics is hosting a press demonstration of its new AI budget forecasting tool at Manchester City Council offices. Date: April 15, 2027, 10:00am BST. Address: Manchester Town Hall, Albert Square, Manchester M2 5DB, Room 4.01. Speaker: James Chen, CEO, plus Manchester City Council finance director. News peg: First AI tool designed for UK public sector accounting. Journalists will get a live demonstration and interview access. RSVP: Sarah Mills, press@clearwateranalytics.example.com, +44 161 555 0123.
Event: Ribbon cutting for a new community garden. Date: Saturday March 29, 2027, 11am. Address: 42 Elm Street, Brighton. Speaker: Local MP. RSVP: info@brightoncommunitygardens.example.org.

Event: Nordic Health Initiative is hosting a press briefing on the results of the first year of its Baltic expansion programme. Date: June 15, 2027, 14:00 CEST. Address: EU Representation Office, Rue de la Loi 170, 1000 Brussels, Belgium, Conference Room B. Speakers: Dr. Ingrid Nørgaard (Executive Director, NHI), a representative from the EU Health Commissioner's office, and Dr. Marta Kalnina (lead researcher, Riga University Hospital). News peg: First-year results of EU4Health-funded cross-border healthcare research. Photography and filming permitted. RSVP: media@nordichealthinitiative.example.org, +45 33 55 0000.
